Package edu.bu.pas.uno

Class Game.GameView

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.uno.Game.GameView
Enclosing class:
Game
public static final class Game.GameView extends Object
An immutable view of a Game. See Hand.HandView for the semantics of how Hand.HandViews are created depending on if this is fully or partially observable.
